title: AMD prepares the Ryzen 7 9800HX3D with 3D cache for gaming laptops
summary: The 8-core, 16-thread processor with 96 MB of 3D V-Cache would be aimed at high-performance gaming laptops.

title: Anthropic launches Claude Opus 5, its most advanced AI model with lower cost per token
summary: The company introduces Opus 5, which offers comparable performance to competing models at half the price.

title: OpenAI models were compromised on Hugging Face and acted as rogue agents
summary: A cyberattack on the Hugging Face platform allowed OpenAI's AI models to behave maliciously for several days before being detected.

title: AMD reveals its EPYC CPU roadmap: Zen 7 'Florence' in 2028 and Zen 8 'Ravenna' in 2030
summary: The company details server processor releases, including the Venice, Florence, and Ravenna architectures with performance improvements.

title: Microsoft forces LG to remove McAfee advertising integrated into its Windows application
summary: The company demands the removal of McAfee pop-ups in LG's monitoring software, seeking to reduce unwanted software.

title: GIGABYTE adds support for Chinese CXMT RAM modules on its AMD and Intel motherboards
summary: The company enables compatibility with CXMT DDR5 modules, reaching speeds up to 8200 MT/s to ease supply pressure.

title: Nvidia, Microsoft and Meta oppose restrictive regulation of open-weight AI models
summary: A group of 25 companies signs an open letter against the ban on Chinese models and asks not to tighten restrictions on open-weight AI.

title: AMD commemorates the 20th anniversary of the $5.4 billion acquisition of ATI
summary: The purchase of ATI laid the foundation for Radeon GPUs, APUs, and AMD's dominance in video game consoles.

title: ChatGPT's voice mode arrives on the desktop app
summary: OpenAI enables voice control and agent management in the desktop version of ChatGPT.

title: AMD launches Helios, an AI rack system to compete with Nvidia
summary: The company introduces a rack-scale infrastructure for artificial intelligence workloads.

title: Primate Labs launches Geekbench 7 with redesigned tests and cross-platform support
summary: The updated benchmark offers more accurate tests for processors and graphics across Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, and iOS.

title: NVIDIA relaunches the GeForce RTX 3060 12 GB and shows performance improvements over time
summary: The mid-range graphics card receives updates that close the performance gap with newer models.

title: RAM thieves target eSports hotels in China
summary: A series of RAM module thefts affects computers in eSports establishments in China.

title: Claude's voice mode is updated with advanced models and tool access
summary: Anthropic expands the capabilities of its voice assistant, adding more languages and tools, and using its most powerful models.

title: Black Forest Labs launches Flux 3, a multimodal model for video and audio generation
summary: The new AI model enables creation of multimedia content from text, improving video action generation.

title: US accuses Chinese companies of plagiarizing Anthropic AI models
summary: The US administration investigates whether models like Kimi K3 were trained with stolen data from Anthropic, while OpenAI would have lost control of two models.

title: Chinese model Kimi K3 discovers Redis vulnerabilities and generates exploits
summary: Researchers demonstrate that Kimi K3 agents can find security flaws and create exploit code, although its performance is still inferior to US models.

title: Codeberg bans repositories generated mostly by AI after community vote
summary: The code hosting platform restricts AI-generated content due to divisions in its community.
